signals.raw: **Ceasefire Extension Status**: The White House confirmed the US has **not formally requested** an extension of the ceasefire, which is set to expire next Tuesday[5]. Simultaneously, Iran's Foreign Ministry stated that **no agreement has been reached** on extending the ceasefire, though diplomatic talks continue through Pakistani mediation[4].
